task.title: Store and inspect a Vela-native development corpus
task.objective: Discover and validate project-native development records recursively with deterministic reporting
acceptance_criteria: Corpus inspection processes JSON records in deterministic relative-path order
Invalid records produce stable diagnostics without stopping inspection
The repository contains sanitized records for the completed bootstrap episodes

attempts.summary: Added failing CLI coverage for valid, malformed, semantically invalid, and missing corpus inputs
attempts.diagnostic: The vela-dev CLI rejected corpus as an unrecognized subcommand

attempts.summary: Implemented recursive JSON discovery, record validation, stable diagnostics, and aggregate counts
Sorted discovered paths before inspection and asserted relative-path output order

outcome.summary: vela-dev inspects the repository corpus deterministically and reports every invalid record

verification.command: nix develop --command cargo run --locked -p vela-dev -- corpus inspect corpus/development

lessons: Test the command boundary before implementing traversal so exit codes and diagnostics remain user-visible contracts
Sort relative paths explicitly because filesystem enumeration order is not deterministic
Continue after record-level failures so one inspection exposes the complete correction set
